text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, our online resources are english only. Please reply to this 
message with an english explaination of what is going on, feel free to 
contact the questions@ mailinglist prior to replying to this message so 
that everything is clear to resolve the problem you are facing.  I am 
closing this ticket till I get the reply.
